name: 250 MG Abiraterone Acetate Tablets
about: The 250 MG Abiraterone Acetate Tablets are a highly effective medication used for the treatment of prostate cancer. The tablets work by blocking the production of testosterone in the body, which is known to fuel the growth of cancer cells. These tablets are available in a dosage form and have a shelf life of 12-24 months. The tablets have a normal fermentation smell and should be stored in a dry place. The tablets are manufactured in India and are supplied, exported, and traded by our business.
